definitions: To stand up or get up, especially from a sitting or lying position.
To rebel or revolt against authority or oppression.
To emerge or become prominent, often in a challenging or opposing way.
To ascend or move upwards, often with a sense of power or determination.
examples: The people will rise up against the dictator.
He watched the phoenix rise up from the ashes.
New leaders often rise up during times of crisis.
The mountains rise up majestically in the distance.
